exposed_functions.name: audit_directory
exposed_functions.description: Recursively checks directory size, file count, and lists empty subdirectories.
exposed_functions.output: { dir_count: int, file_count: int, total_size_kb: float, empty_dirs: list[str] }

exposed_functions.name: sweep_empty_folders
exposed_functions.description: Purges empty husk folders recursively within a given directory.

exposed_functions.name: merge_payloads
exposed_functions.description: Move raw code from a source directory into the payload of a target directory.
exposed_functions.input: { source_dir: string, target_dir: string, overwrite: bool }
